creator: pr@aoek.com
text:
Created attachment 229403
patch xsane pkg-message.in

The current pkg-message refers to an outdated location of the GIMP configuration directory (~/.gimp-*) , as such it does not work. The current location is ~/.config/GIMP.

The suggested patch fixes this problem and further improves the usability of the plugin that now works with different GIMP versions as well.
